args.summary: Customer Anya Garcia (user ID: anya_garcia_5901) needs to cancel reservation 3RK2T9 due to illness. Customer insists they purchased travel insurance for this basic economy booking (confirmed on May 2nd, 2024), but the reservation system shows insurance status as "no". Customer has confirmation email showing insurance was added. This discrepancy needs investigation as it affects cancellation eligibility for illness-related refund.
